title: dryopteris doniana
intro: Dryopteris doniana, also known as the silverback fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris doniana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
